hero.title: Aura Monster Simulator Wiki
hero.description: Climb an endless staircase, collect Aura, dodge hazards, use Gems for aura rolls, unlock titles, rebirth, and upgrade your climbing skills in this Roblox obby simulator.

gameFeature.title: Aura Monster Simulator Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Climb an endless staircase, collect Aura, spend it on climbing upgrades, roll aura effects in the Aura Shop with Gems, and push toward higher floors in this Roblox obby simulator.

auraCodes.title: Aura Monster Simulator Codes
auraCodes.subtitle: Redeem active Aura Monster Simulator codes for free Gems and timed 2x Aura Boost rewards. Codes are case-sensitive, so enter each one exactly as shown.
auraCodes.intro: Use the Codes icon on the left side of the screen, paste the code into the text box, and press Enter to claim the reward. Gems are used for Aura Shop rolls, while Aura Boosts speed up climbing progress during the endless staircase grind.

auraBeginnerGuide.title: Aura Monster Simulator Beginner Guide
auraBeginnerGuide.subtitle: Learn the basic loop: climb the stairs, gain Aura, spend Aura on climbing upgrades, and push into harder floors. The game is built around repeating that loop until your climb becomes stronger.
auraBeginnerGuide.intro: Aura Monster Simulator is an endless staircase Roblox experience by Daniel's Birthday Gift!!! Players become an Aura Monster, climb to gain Aura, improve climbing skills, avoid increasing danger, collect titles, and keep pushing higher.

items.title: Start Climbing
items.action: Move forward on the staircase as soon as you load in.
items.result: Climbing is the main way to gain Aura, which drives your early progression.

items.title: Collect Aura
items.action: Keep climbing to build up Aura over time.
items.result: Aura is the core resource used to improve climbing skills.

items.title: Spend Aura on Upgrades
items.action: Use earned Aura to upgrade your climbing ability instead of holding it for too long.
items.result: Upgrades help you climb faster, higher, and more efficiently.

items.title: Watch Higher-Floor Danger
items.action: Stay alert as you climb because the game becomes more dangerous the higher you go.
items.result: Cleaner movement helps you keep progress instead of losing time to hazards.

items.title: Use Free Code Rewards Early
items.action: Redeem Gems and Aura Boost codes before a focused climb session.
items.result: Gems give extra Aura Shop rolls, and 2x Aura Boosts help early progression move faster.

items.title: Roll in the Aura Shop
items.action: Spend Gems in the Aura Shop to roll for aura effects.
items.result: More rolls give you more options for improving your climb setup.

items.title: Repeat the Progression Loop
items.action: Climb, earn Aura, upgrade, push higher, and repeat.
items.result: The staircase does not end, so steady upgrades matter more than one short climb.

auraControlsGuide.title: Aura Monster Simulator Controls Guide
auraControlsGuide.subtitle: Use the correct movement and auto-climb controls for PC, controller, and mobile. This keeps the climb simple instead of turning basic movement into a struggle.
auraControlsGuide.intro: Aura Monster Simulator lists separate controls for keyboard, controller, and mobile players. Forward, left, right, and auto inputs are the only controls players need to start climbing properly.

items.note: Keyboard movement uses standard WASD-style inputs.
Controller movement uses shoulder buttons for left and right movement.
Mobile controls use screen zones for direction inputs.

auraFarmingAndUpgrades.title: Aura Monster Simulator Aura Farming and Upgrades Guide
auraFarmingAndUpgrades.subtitle: Farm Aura by climbing the endless staircase, then spend it on climbing upgrades to push higher. Code rewards make the early climb faster by adding Gems and timed 2x Aura Boost windows.
auraFarmingAndUpgrades.intro: The main farming route is direct: climb stairs to gain Aura, use Aura to improve climbing skills, redeem codes for extra resources, and use Gems for Aura Shop rolls. Higher floors become more dangerous, so stronger upgrades and cleaner movement both matter.

items.name: Redeem Code Rewards First
items.howToUse: Claim active codes before a focused climb so Gems and Aura Boost rewards start helping immediately.
items.whyItMatters: Free Gems add Aura Shop rolls, while 2x Aura Boost rewards speed up Aura gain during active climbing.

items.name: Keep Climbing for Aura
items.howToUse: Stay on the staircase and keep moving upward to build Aura over time.
items.whyItMatters: Aura is the resource used to upgrade climbing skills, so every climb feeds the next upgrade cycle.

items.name: Upgrade Climbing Skills
items.howToUse: Spend Aura on climbing upgrades instead of letting early resources sit unused.
items.whyItMatters: Better climbing skills help you climb faster, higher, and more efficiently.

items.name: Use 2x Aura Boost Time Actively
items.howToUse: After receiving a timed 2x Aura Boost, keep climbing instead of idling in menus.
items.whyItMatters: Timed boosts are most valuable when every minute is spent gaining Aura.

items.name: Spend Gems in the Aura Shop
items.howToUse: Use Gems from codes to roll for aura effects in the Aura Shop.
items.whyItMatters: More Aura Shop rolls give players more build options without needing to grind every Gem manually.

items.name: Push Higher After Upgrades
items.howToUse: Return to the staircase after upgrades and test how much farther the improved climb can go.
items.whyItMatters: The game becomes more dangerous at higher floors, so upgrades should be followed by higher-floor attempts.

auraGemsAndAuraShop.title: Aura Monster Simulator Gems and Aura Shop Guide
auraGemsAndAuraShop.subtitle: Gems are the premium resource used for Aura Shop rolls, while Aura Boosts help you earn more Aura during climb sessions. Use code Gems early to test useful aura effects, then save once your current effect supports longer climbs.
auraGemsAndAuraShop.intro: Aura Monster Simulator is built around climbing the endless stairs, gaining Aura, upgrading climbing skills, and using Gems in the Aura Shop to roll aura effects. The clean early route is simple: redeem Gem codes, roll enough to improve your starter setup, spend earned Aura on climbing upgrades, and keep timed 2x Aura boosts for active climbing sessions.

items.usedFor: Aura Shop rolls for different aura effects.
items.bestAction: Redeem Gem codes before your first serious climb, roll only until you have an effect that helps progression, then keep spare Gems for later rolls.

items.usedFor: Doubling Aura gain during an active climb session.
items.bestAction: Start a timed boost when you can climb without interruption and buy upgrades during the same session.

items.usedFor: Rolling aura effects that shape your climb efficiency and build direction.
items.bestAction: Test an effect through a full climb cycle before spending more Gems on another reroll.

items.usedFor: Upgrading climbing skills and pushing farther up the endless staircase.
items.bestAction: Spend Aura on practical climbing upgrades before attempting a high-floor push or rebirth cycle.

auraRebirthGuide.title: Aura Monster Simulator Rebirth Guide
auraRebirthGuide.subtitle: Rebirth is the long-term progression reset that lets each climb cycle become stronger. The best timing is after your current run slows down and before you spend more time on upgrades that no longer move your climb forward efficiently.
auraRebirthGuide.intro: Aura Monster Simulator uses a repeating loop: climb stairs, earn Aura, buy climbing upgrades, roll aura effects with Gems, then rebirth to grow stronger for the next cycle. Treat rebirth like a planned reset: finish your active boost window, use your current resources, then restart the climb with better long-term scaling.

items.title: Build the First Climb
items.goal: Climb the staircase, gain Aura, and buy the early upgrades that make movement and Aura income feel smoother.
items.playerAction: Use your first code Gems for Aura Shop rolls only after you understand what your current climb is missing.

items.title: Check the Slowdown Point
items.goal: Watch for the moment when upgrades feel expensive and your floor progress slows.
items.playerAction: Prepare for rebirth once the next permanent gain is more valuable than forcing another short climb with weak returns.

items.title: Rebirth Cleanly
items.goal: Use rebirth as the reset that turns previous climbing effort into stronger long-term scaling.
items.playerAction: Finish active boost time first, spend useful Aura upgrades, then rebirth when the cycle is ready.

items.title: Recover Fast After Rebirth
items.goal: Rebuild basic climbing speed quickly and return to your previous floor range with better scaling.
items.playerAction: Buy low-cost upgrades first, test your current aura effect, then start a 2x Aura boost for the next uninterrupted push.

auraHighFloorSurvival.title: Aura Monster Simulator High Floor Survival Guide
auraHighFloorSurvival.subtitle: The higher you climb, the more dangerous the staircase gets. High-floor runs are easier when your controls, Aura upgrades, Aura Shop effect, and boost timing are set before the danger ramps up.
auraHighFloorSurvival.intro: High floors are not just a stat check. Aura Monster Simulator asks you to climb, dodge hazards, keep earning Aura, and avoid movement mistakes as danger increases. Use this checklist before pushing for a new highest floor.

items.check: Confirm your controls before a record attempt
items.whyItMatters: The game supports PC, controller, and mobile controls, and high-floor mistakes become more costly as danger rises.
items.action: Use W/A/D on PC, A/L1/R1 on controller, or the left/middle/right mobile screen zones until movement feels automatic.

items.whyItMatters: Aura earned from climbing is used to upgrade climbing skills, which directly supports longer stair runs.
items.action: Buy practical climbing upgrades before attempting a new highest-floor push.

items.check: Use timed 2x Aura boosts during active climbing
items.whyItMatters: Code boosts are time-limited, so idle time reduces their value.
items.action: Start an AURAMONSTER or HAPPYBIRTHDAYDANIEL boost only when you are ready to climb and upgrade continuously.

items.check: Set your Aura Shop effect before the run
items.whyItMatters: Gems are spent in the Aura Shop for aura effects that support progression.
items.action: Avoid last-second rerolling before a high-floor attempt; test one useful effect through a full climb cycle.

items.check: Treat higher floors as hazard zones
items.whyItMatters: The staircase becomes more dangerous the higher you climb, and hazards are part of the climb.
items.action: Slow down briefly when a segment becomes risky, then resume speed after the danger pattern is clear.

items.check: Reset the cycle when progress stalls
items.whyItMatters: Rebirth is part of the long-term climb loop and helps later attempts become stronger.
items.action: After repeated failed pushes, rebirth and rebuild instead of spending boosts on a stalled run.

auraDiscordAndUpdates.title: Aura Monster Simulator Discord and Updates Guide
auraDiscordAndUpdates.subtitle: The Roblox page currently labels the game as UPDATE V1.75 and points players toward the server for updates, polls, suggestions, and more. Use the official game page, Roblox community, and Discord first.
auraDiscordAndUpdates.intro: Aura Monster Simulator updates are easiest to follow through the official Roblox game page, the Daniel's Birthday Gift!!! community page, and the linked Discord server. This section keeps the update trail clear for new codes, like milestones, and version-title changes.

items.question: Where is the official Aura Monster Simulator game page?
items.answer: Use the Roblox experience page for the current title, play button, creator name, controls, and update label. The current page title shows Aura Monster Simulator [UPDATE V1.75].

items.question: Who is the Aura Monster Simulator creator community?
items.answer: The experience is published by Daniel's Birthday Gift!!!, and the Roblox community page is the main group link connected to the game.

items.question: Where should players look for new Aura Monster Simulator updates and codes?
items.answer: The Roblox description tells players to join the server for updates, polls, suggestions, and more. New codes are commonly tied to updates, events, and like milestones, so Discord and the Roblox community should be checked first.

items.question: Which current Aura Monster Simulator code rewards matter for update tracking?
items.answer: The current reward pool includes Gems and timed 2x Aura boosts. Key examples include HAPPYBIRTHDAYDANIEL for 250 Gems plus 2 hours of 2x Aura, AURAMONSTER for 1 hour of 2x Aura, 500LIKES for 200 Gems, and LATE100LIKES for 100 Gems.

items.question: How should Aura Monster Simulator like milestone codes be handled?
items.answer: Like milestone codes such as 500LIKES and LATE100LIKES should be redeemed quickly and tracked separately from event codes, because milestone rewards can expire after the update window closes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Aura Monster Simulator

questions.question: What is Aura Monster Simulator?
questions.answer: Aura Monster Simulator is a Roblox endless staircase climbing game by Daniel's Birthday Gift!!! Players climb to gain Aura, spend Aura on climbing upgrades, roll aura effects in the Aura Shop with Gems, unlock titles, and rebirth for stronger long-term scaling.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes in Aura Monster Simulator?
questions.answer: In Aura Monster Simulator, open the Codes icon on the left side of the screen, paste a code into the text box, and press Enter. Codes are case-sensitive, so enter each one exactly as shown to claim Gems and timed 2x Aura Boost rewards.

questions.question: What are Gems used for in Aura Monster Simulator?
questions.answer: In Aura Monster Simulator, Gems are the premium resource used for Aura Shop rolls. Each roll gives you a chance at a different aura effect that shapes your climb efficiency and build direction.

questions.question: How does rebirth work in Aura Monster Simulator?
questions.answer: In Aura Monster Simulator, rebirth is a planned progression reset that turns your current climbing effort into stronger long-term scaling. The best timing is after your run slows down, once permanent gains beat forcing another short climb.

questions.question: Which platforms is Aura Monster Simulator on?
questions.answer: Aura Monster Simulator is a Roblox experience playable on PC, controller, and mobile. Each platform has its own forward, left, right, and auto inputs for climbing the endless staircase.

questions.question: Where can I find new Aura Monster Simulator codes and updates?
questions.answer: New Aura Monster Simulator codes and updates are posted through the official Roblox game page, the Daniel's Birthday Gift!!! community, and the linked Discord server. Codes are often tied to updates, events, and like milestones.

codes.whatIs: What Are Aura Monster Simulator Codes?
codes.whatIsDescription: Aura Monster Simulator codes are promotional strings released by the developer that grant free in-game rewards such as Gems and timed 2x Aura Boosts. Codes are case-sensitive and redeemed in the Codes menu to accelerate early progression, Aura Shop rolls, and climbing upgrades.
codes.why: Why Redeem Aura Monster Simulator Codes?

whySteps.step1Title: Free Gems for Aura Shop rolls
whySteps.step1Description: Redeemed codes grant Gems you spend in the Aura Shop to roll for powerful aura effects that boost your climbing power.
whySteps.step2Description: Many codes grant temporary Aura generation boosts that double your Aura gain and speed up climbing skill upgrades.
whySteps.step3Description: Free rewards from codes let you skip early grinding and reach higher floors sooner without spending Robux.

aura.whatIsDescription: Aura is the core resource in Aura Monster Simulator, generated by climbing the endless staircase and spent on climbing skill upgrades. Aura effects and Aura Shop rolls provide multipliers that accelerate your climb and unlock new milestones.

gems.whatIs: What Are Gems in Aura Monster Simulator?
gems.whatIsDescription: Gems are the premium currency in Aura Monster Simulator, spent in the Aura Shop to roll for powerful aura effects and rarities. You earn Gems from codes, climbing milestones, and farming routes, then convert them into aura rolls that define your build.

whySteps.step1Title: Free Gems from codes and farming
whySteps.step1Description: Active codes and dedicated farming routes provide a steady stream of free Gems without spending Robux.
whySteps.step2Description: The Aura Shop turns Gems into aura effects and rarities; prioritize rolls that multiply Aura generation and climbing power.
whySteps.step3Description: A clear Gem spending plan keeps your Aura Shop rolls aligned with your build instead of draining resources randomly.

monsters.whatIs: What Are Monsters in Aura Monster Simulator?
monsters.whatIsDescription: Monsters are rollable forms and companions in Aura Monster Simulator that provide passive bonuses to Aura generation, climbing speed, and resource gain. You unlock monsters through progression and upgrade them to amplify your build as you climb the endless staircase.

whySteps.step1Description: Use the monster tier list to pick the highest-value monsters that match your Aura and climbing strategy.
whySteps.step2Description: Follow the unlock route to add new monsters without wasting resources on low-value rolls.
whySteps.step3Description: Monster upgrades deliver lasting multipliers that scale with your climb and rebirth progression.

stairs.description: Conquer the endless staircase and infinite tower in Aura Monster Simulator with the best climbing strategy, upgrade route, and farming tips.
stairs.whatIs: What Are the Stairs in Aura Monster Simulator?
stairs.whatIsDescription: The endless staircase and infinite tower form the core gameplay loop of Aura Monster Simulator. You climb higher floors to generate Aura, dodge hazards, and unlock upgrades, with each floor rewarding progress and pushing your rebirth potential.

whySteps.step1Description: Every floor you climb produces Aura, the primary resource for all climbing skill upgrades.
whySteps.step2Description: Higher floors introduce tougher hazards; learning movement and zone-based controls keeps your runs alive.
whySteps.step3Description: Reaching new tower milestones unlocks titles, aura effects, and rebirth thresholds that permanently boost your power.

sins.whatIs: What Are Aura Monster Simulator Sins?
sins.whatIsDescription: Sins are a specialization system in Aura Monster Simulator that grant passive bonuses to Aura generation, climbing speed, or resource gain. Each Sin has unique effects, and you can reroll to switch Sin as your build and progression stage change.

whySteps.step1Description: Different Sins suit different playstyles; some boost Aura farming, others speed up climbing or enhance Gem gain.
whySteps.step2Description: Picking the best Sin for your current stage multiplies your efficiency and shortens the grind to higher floors.
whySteps.step3Description: As your build evolves, rerolling Sins keeps your bonuses aligned with your strategy instead of locking you in.
